title: The Handlooms (Reservation of Articles for Production) Act, 1985
full_text: The Handlooms (Reservation of Articles for Production) Act, 1985 हथकरघा (उत्‍पादनार्थ वस्‍तु आरक्षण) अधिनियम,1985 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 198522 Act Number: 22 Enactment Date: 1985-03-29 Act Year: 1985 Short Title: The Handlooms (Reservation of Articles for Production) Act, 1985 Hindi Title: हथकरघा (उत्‍पादनार्थ वस्‍तु आरक्षण) अधिनियम,1985 Long Title: An Act to provide for reservation of certain articles for exclusive production by handlooms and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Textiles Enforcement Date: 31-03-1986 Notification: 31st March, 1986, vide notification No. G.S.R 505(E), dated 10th March, 1986, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(i). TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Handlooms (Reservation of Articles for Production) Act, 1985 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Power to specify articles for exclusive production by handlooms. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Constitution of Advisory Committee. Show Related Subordinates Section 5. Prohibition of production of articles exclusively reserved for handlooms. Section 6. Power to call for information or to furnish samples. Show Related Subordinates Section 7. Power to enter and impact. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Power to search and seize. Show Related Subordinates Section 9. Search and seizure to be made in accordance with the Code of Criminal Procedure,1973. Section 10. Penalty for contravention of orders made under section 3. Section 11. False statement. Section 12. Attempts and abetment. Section 13. Offences by companies. Section 14. Offences to be cognizable. Section 15. Power to delegate. Section 16. Power of Central Government to give directions. Show Related Subordinates Section 17. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 18. Power to exempt. Section 19. Power to make rules.
